paper_title: VersaVogue: Visual Expert Orchestration and Preference Alignment for Unified Fashion Synthesis

methodology.data_construction: Preference data without human annotation or task-specific reward models

key_innovation: Unified framework that bridges garment generation and virtual dressing as a multi-condition controllable generation problem
figure_1_description: Differences in workflows between virtual try-on methods and VersaVogue. Try-on methods are restricted to showcase stage and rely on explicit model images, while VersaVogue establishes unified workflow from garment design to virtual dressing, synthesizing on-body results directly from text descriptions

results.performance: Consistently outperforms existing methods in visual fidelity, semantic consistency, and fine-grained controllability
results.evaluation: Extensive experiments on both garment generation and virtual dressing benchmarks

title: VersaVogue: Visual Expert Orchestration and Preference Alignment for Unified Fashion Synthesis
